{"credits": [{"type": "finder", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/170326711?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Piravlos/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Piravlos/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Piravlos/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Piravlos/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/Piravlos", "id": 170326711, "login": "Piravlos", "node_id": "U_kgDOCib6tw", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Piravlos/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Piravlos/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Piravlos/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Piravlos/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Piravlos/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/Piravlos", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-46543", "cvss": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:L"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-617", "name": "Reachable Assertion"}], "description": "### Impact
A remote peer can crash any full node by sending a RequestBatchSet message containing the genesis block's hash. The handler calls `get_epoch_chunks` which iterates backwards through macro blocks using `Policy::macro_block_before`. When it reaches the genesis block number, `macro_block_before` panics with "No macro blocks before genesis block".

### Patches
[The patch for this vulnerability](https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/pull/3745) is formally released as part of [v1.5.0](https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/releases/tag/v1.5.0).

### Workarounds
No Workaround, although requesting the genesis batch set is not used during normal operation.

### Resources
See [PR](https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/pull/3745).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00291, "percentile": 0.20611}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-vghx-352f-93jm", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-21T19:46:15Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-vghx-352f-93jm", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-vghx-352f-93jm"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-46543"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-10T00:16:54Z", "published_at": "2026-05-21T19:46:15Z", "references": ["https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/security/advisories/GHSA-vghx-352f-93jm", "https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/pull/3745", "https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/commit/8e8b0abdb1b66f5e9b25b3833879f05c173a5596", "https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/releases/tag/v1.5.0", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-46543", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-vghx-352f-93jm"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/security-advisories/GHSA-vghx-352f-93jm", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross", "summary": "nimiq-blockchain: Genesis batch set request", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-10T13:41:39Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-vghx-352f-93jm", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.5.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "nimiq-blockchain"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.5.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: nimiq-blockchain: Genesis batch set request
